title: Glam Nudes
description: Enhance your natural tone with a nude lipstick palette for the creative type, with three shades that you can blend as you like!
ingredients: Citrullus Lanatus Seed Oil (Kalahari Melon Oil)
Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)
Ricinus Communis Seed Oil (Organic Castor Oil)
Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Peel Cera (Orange Peel Wax)

images.alt: A square, two-toned block of Glam Nudes ~ Lip square with glossy terracotta brown and matte peachy nude sections. The center features a raised, textured, circular design in pearlescent champagne nude.

A person with long blonde hair, wearing a pink ribbed top, smiles at the camera while resting their chin on their hand. They wear a light peachy-nude lip color, likely from the Glam Nudes ~ Lip square, against a bright magenta background.

A person with long blonde hair, wearing a pink ribbed top, smiles broadly at the camera while resting their chin on their hand. They wear a light peachy-nude lip color, likely from the Glam Nudes ~ Lip square, against a bright magenta background.

A person with long blonde hair, wearing a pink top, smiles at the camera while applying a nude lip color with a gold brush. The shade is consistent with the Glam Nudes ~ Lip square, set against a bright magenta background.

Three forearms with various complexions are shown on a light grey background. Each has three swatches of Glam Nudes ~ Lip square product, including shades of terracotta brown, peachy nude, and shimmering champagne nude.
